name: memorydetective
description: iOS leak hunting + performance investigation. Reads .memgraph and .trace files, classifies retain cycles against a 36-pattern catalog (SwiftUI / Combine / Concurrency / UIKit / Core Animation / Core Data / SwiftData / Coordinator / RxSwift / Realm). v1.15 is the schema coverage + verify-fix UX release: analyzeMemoryFootprint (38th tool, VM resident/dirty + jetsam diagnosis), analyzeEnergyImpact (39th tool, battery drain), analyzeLeakTimeline (40th tool, xctrace leaks-as-time-series), summarizeTrace chains analyzeNetworkActivity, replayScenario captures simulator screenshots per step. v1.14 was the trace-side reliability release. v1.13 shipped summarizeTrace single-call cross-schema synthesis. v1.12 completed reference-tree propagation across countAlive, findRetainers, verifyFix. v1.11 added inspectTrace, diffMemgraphs ref-tree, CLI abandoned-memory mini-table. v1.9 added analyzeAbandonedMemory, detectLeaksInXCTest, cleanupTraces, mainThreadViolations. Single-call build + boot + launch fixes the macOS 26.x leaks --outputGraph regression. Bridges to Swift source via SourceKit-LSP. 40 MCP tools, 34 catalog resources, 6 investigation prompts.
